app_release_notes: v1.2.29 - Your Results screen now tells you what the best-load call is WORTH: a plain-English line under your winner saying whether your own ladder can back it up, or whether it is too noisy to call yet. Plus: the Measure screen now reads back the scale VALUE you entered ("Scale: 1.5 in"), so you can confirm it at a glance.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.28 - Drag your target photos straight onto the Measure screen instead of hunting for the file. Plus, distance suggestions now go out to 1000 yd (300 / 600 / 800 / 1000) for known-distance and long-range shooters, and you can still type any value.
